ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "exp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the experiment was conducted */,
  "exp_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., CO2 exchange, H2O exchange) */,
  "exp_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "setup_config" TEXT /* Configuration of the experimental setup */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the site */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the site was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "meas_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "exp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the measurement belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "CO2R" REAL /* CO2 reference value */,
  "CO2S" REAL /* CO2 sample value */,
  "H2OR" REAL /* H2O reference value */,
  "H2OS" REAL /* H2O sample value */,
  "Tair" REAL /* Air temperature */,
  "Tleaf" REAL /* Leaf temperature */,
  "TBlk" REAL /* Block temperature */,
  "light_intensity" REAL /* Light intensity during the measurement */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the measurement */,
  "leaf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leaf associated with the measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meas_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_leaf_id FOREIGN KEY ("leaf_id") REFERENCES leaves ("leaf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_exp_id FOREIGN KEY ("exp_id") REFERENCES experiments ("exp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaves" (
  "leaf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaf */,
  "exp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the leaf belongs to */,
  "leaf_age" TEXT /* Age of the leaf */,
  "leaf_number" INTEGER /* Number of the leaf */,
  "leaf_position" TEXT /* Position of the leaf */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the plant */,
  "genotype" TEXT /* Genotype of the plant */,
  "phenotype" TEXT /* Phenotype of the plant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the leaf was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the leaf */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaves_exp_id FOREIGN KEY ("exp_id") REFERENCES experiments ("exp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "exp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_exp_id FOREIGN KEY ("exp_id") REFERENCES experiments ("exp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
